hero.title: Design the home of your dreams
hero.subtitle: A turnkey architectural project — from concept to a construction cost estimate. Want to build it? We'll do that together too.

whyUs.title: Premium in every detail
whyUs.subtitle: We take responsibility for the result at every stage — from the architectural project to the keys.

advantages.title: Team of architects
advantages.description: An individual project tailored to your lifestyle.

advantages.title: Design and construction
advantages.description: We develop the project and, if you wish, build it turnkey — with no intermediaries.

advantages.title: Fixed estimate
advantages.description: The price is locked in the contract and never changes during construction.

advantages.title: 10-year warranty
advantages.description: On load-bearing structures and the home's engineering systems.

designPromo.title: We design turnkey house projects
designPromo.text: Need just the architectural project? We develop the full documentation package — from concept to a construction cost estimate. The finished project can be built by any construction team.

featured.title: Featured projects
featured.subtitle: A few of the 120+ homes we have built turnkey.

showcase.title: A home that reflects your lifestyle
showcase.subtitle: We combine architectural expression, flawless engineering and natural materials — so that every square metre serves you for decades.

howItWorks.title: Your project in three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: It starts with the architectural project. Construction is the next step, if you want it.

steps.title: Choose a design package
steps.description: Light, Basic or Premium — depending on the scope of documentation you need.

steps.title: Get your project
steps.description: Architectural and structural sections, visualization and a construction cost estimate — in 2–3 months.

steps.title: Build together (optional)
steps.description: The finished project can be built by our team or any other construction company.

hero.title: Velar Development
hero.subtitle: We design and build premium-class houses, villas and cottages turnkey — and bring architecture back to life through careful restoration.

story.title: We design and build homes that outlive generations
story.p1: Velar Development is a team of architects, engineers and builders. It all starts with an architectural project: we develop the full documentation package and, if you wish, build it turnkey — from the first sketch to handing over the keys.
story.p2: A separate focus is restoration. We bring historic and neglected buildings back to life, preserving their character while equipping them with modern engineering and comfort.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: A full cycle of premium-segment real estate work.

items.title: Architectural design
items.description: Architectural and structural sections, visualization and a construction cost estimate — from concept to finished documentation.

items.title: House construction
items.description: Turnkey private houses — from design to engineering and finishing.

items.title: Premium villas
items.description: Spacious villas with pools, SPA and full Smart Home integration.

items.title: Cottages & communities
items.description: Cozy cottages and full-scale development of cottage communities.

items.title: Restoration
items.description: Restoring historic and old buildings while preserving their character.

values.title: The principles we build on
values.subtitle: What defines every decision we make.

items.title: Uncompromising quality
items.description: Proven materials, control at every stage and a guaranteed result.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: A fixed estimate and honest communication — with no hidden costs.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: Energy-efficient solutions, Smart Home and modern construction technology.

items.title: Attention to detail
items.description: Bespoke design and flawless finishing in every square metre.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.subtitle: Order an architectural design project or browse our completed work.

hero.title: Turnkey house design projects
hero.subtitle: We develop a complete architectural project for your future home — from concept to construction-ready documentation.

intro.title: A standalone service for those who need just the project
intro.text: Order the architectural and structural sections plus a construction cost estimate — and add visualization or support with obtaining a building permit if needed. The finished project can be built by any construction team.

pricing.title: Choose a design package
pricing.subtitle: The price depends on the house area and the scope of services.

payment.title: Pay in 3 stages
payment.subtitle: No full upfront payment — pay gradually as the work progresses.

stages.title: Project kickoff
stages.description: After signing the contract — we start work on the architectural section.

stages.title: Design development
stages.description: Paid during preparation of the structural section and visualization.

stages.title: Project completion
stages.description: Final payment after delivering the finished project documentation.

advantages.title: Why design with Velar
items: Direct contact with the architect online

cta.title: Ready to start your design project?
cta.text: Leave your contacts — an architect will reach out, discuss the details and help pick the best package.

projects.title: Our completed projects
projects.subtitle: Over 120 premium-class homes built turnkey across the country.

footer.tagline: Turnkey construction of premium-class private homes. From idea to keys — with a guaranteed result.

style.heading: Choose the architectural style
style.subtitle: It defines the character of the home and the base cost.

classic.label: Classic
classic.description: Symmetrical façades, noble proportions, restrained elegance.

baroque.label: Baroque
baroque.description: Ornate stucco, columns and lavish façades.

minimalism.label: Minimalism
minimalism.description: Clean forms and maximum space without excess decor.

toscana.label: Tuscan
toscana.description: Warm tones, natural stone, the spirit of an Italian villa.

area.heading: What is the home's area?
area.subtitle: Total floor area in square metres.

details.heading: Project details
details.subtitle: A few clarifications — and we'll give you a more precise price.

finish.title: Finish level
finish.hint: Has the biggest impact on the final cost.

engineering.heading: Construction & engineering
engineering.subtitle: Technical decisions that affect comfort and the estimate.

heating.title: Heating
heating.hint: You can choose several types — they work great in combination.

plot.title: Do you have a plot of land?
plot.hint: This helps the manager prepare an offer.

search.label: I need help
search.description: We'll find a plot for the project.

options.heading: Extra options
options.subtitle: Choose everything that will make your home perfect.

smartHome.label: Smart Home
smartHome.description: Lighting, climate and security in one app.

result.title: Your project is ready
result.view3dCaption: An interactive model of the house
result.budgetNote: * Estimated cost. The exact quote will be calculated by a manager.
result.ctaTitle: Ready to bring the project to life?
result.ctaText: Leave your contacts — and within 24 hours you'll receive a detailed estimate, a full 3D visualization and a personal offer from a manager.
result.successText: Thank you. Your personal manager is already preparing an offer. Here's what happens next:
nextSteps: A manager will contact you within 15 minutes.
We'll align the details and prepare the final estimate.
We'll deliver the project, a 3D tour and a personal offer.
result.unlockedNote: Request received — your manager will send the personalized visualization.
result.bigCta: Get the visualization and a consultation

callback.successSnack: Thank you! A manager will call you shortly.

project.likeText: Configure your own villa in three minutes.

meta.defaultTitle: Velar Development — architectural design & premium villa construction
meta.defaultDescription: Velar Development — architectural design for premium-class houses, villas and cottages: from concept to a construction cost estimate. Turnkey construction and restoration if you want to go further.

home.title: Velar Development — architectural design & premium villa construction
home.description: Architectural design for premium-class houses, villas and cottages — from concept to a construction cost estimate in 2–3 months. Turnkey construction and restoration for those who want to go further.

about.title: About
about.description: Velar Development — a team of architects and builders. We start with the architectural project and, if you wish, build premium-class houses, villas and cottages turnkey, and restore historic buildings.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: Completed turnkey premium-class home projects: modern, neoclassical, chalet and Mediterranean styles. Over 120 finished projects.

configurator.title: Configurator
configurator.description: Velar's online house configurator: choose the style, area, finishes and options — and get a project, 3D visualization and an estimated budget in 3 minutes.

design.title: House Design Projects
design.description: Turnkey architectural design from $15/m², 2–3 months, payment in 3 stages. Light, Basic and Premium packages with cost estimate, visualization and building permit assistance.
